mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, exam_id, delete_flag FROM osh_exam_collection WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND exam_id = #{examId} LIMIT 1
SELECT exam_id FROM osh_exam_collection WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE osh_exam_collection SET delete_flag = #{deleteFlag}, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
